composition.Programmer 1: Fix and complete the Flask application main.py file. Ensure all routes correctly render the required HTML templates and handle data reading from the 'data' directory. Address the issue of missing or incomplete data files by implementing robust error handling and fallback mechanisms. Verify that all page routes (dashboard, movie_catalog, movie_details, showtime_selection, seat_selection, booking_confirmation, booking_history, booking_details, theater_information) function correctly with proper data loading and 404 handling. Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure the templates rendered by main.py match the templates implemented.
composition.Programmer 2: Implement all required HTML template files for the 'MovieTicketing' web application in the 'templates' directory. Templates to implement include  dashboard.html, catalog.html, movie_details.html, showtimes.html, seat_selection.html, booking_confirmation.html, booking_history.html, booking_details.html, theaters.html. Each template must strictly follow the element IDs and page design specifications outlined in the requirements document, ensuring full UI/UX compliance. Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm that template variable names and page navigation links correspond exactly to those used in main.py.
